name: Avery Sharpe
abstract: Avery Sharpe (born August 23, 1954) is an American jazz double-bassist, electric bassist, composer, educator and founder of the artist-owned record label, JKNM Records. Sharpe has a distinguished percussive and rhythmic approach on double bass.

concerts.label: Kool Jazz Festival: The Young Lions

works.t: What Ever Happened To The Dream Deferred

about_quotes.speaker: Tyner McCoy
about_quotes.evidence: Avery and Aaron Scott seemed to be your rhythm section for a while... focused on the core of your group, that rhythm section, so Avery Sharpe
